teks_inggris: Federal judge dismisses DOJ lawsuit against Maine's Secretary of State Shenna Bellows over the state's refusal to turn over voter data to the government.

teks_inggris: The team of scientists from James Cook University, University of Western Australia and Edith Cowan University surveyed coral reefs in the West Australian Houtman Abrolhos group of islands (HAI), publishing their findings on the extraordinary heat resilience of its corals in the journal Current Biology.
teks_jawa: Tim ilmuwan saka Universitas James Cook, Universitas Australia Barat lan Universitas Edith Cowan nliti terumbu karang ing klompok pulo Houtman Abrolhos Australia Barat (HAI), nerbitake temuan babagan ketahanan panas sing luar biasa saka karang ing jurnal Biologi Saiki.
teks_sunda: Tim ilmuwan ti James Cook University, Universitas Australia Kulon jeung Edith Cowan Universitas surveyed terumbu karang di West Australian Houtman Abrolhos grup pulo (HAI), medarkeun papanggihan maranéhanana dina resilience panas rongkah tina corals na dina jurnal Biologi Ayeuna.

teks_inggris: Deepa Jewellers, a B2B hallmarked gold jewellery processor based in Hyderabad, and Cotec Healthcare, a pharmaceutical CDMO, both received SEBI approval for their IPOs. Deepa's IPO includes a Rs 250 crore fresh issue and an offer for sale by promoters.

teks_sunda: Deepa Jewellers, prosesor perhiasan emas B2B anu ditandaan di Hyderabad, sareng Cotec Healthcare, CDMO farmasi, duanana nampi persetujuan SEBI pikeun IPOs na. IPO Deepa kalebet masalah seger Rs 250 crore sareng tawaran pikeun dijual ku promotor.

teks_inggris: For all the diversity of the human condition, one experience is almost universally painful: adolescence. It's also unusual. Most other species pass from puberty to adulthood quickly, but humans linger for years in a transitional state, not quite children but not quite adults, either.
teks_jawa: Kanggo kabeh macem-macem kahanan manungsa, siji pengalaman meh kabeh nglarani: remaja. Iku uga ora biasa. Umume spesies liya liwati saka pubertas nganti diwasa kanthi cepet, nanging manungsa tetep nganti pirang-pirang taun ing negara transisi, ora cukup bocah nanging uga ora diwasa.
teks_sunda: Pikeun sakabéh keragaman kaayaan manusa, hiji pangalaman ampir universal nyeri: rumaja. Éta ogé teu biasa. Kalolobaan spésiés séjén lulus ti pubertas nepi ka dewasa gancang, tapi manusa linger mangtaun-taun dina kaayaan transisi, teu cukup barudak tapi teu cukup dewasa, boh.

teks_inggris: Dead seal pups on a Canadian island have been found with mysterious spiral-shaped injuries for years. The wounds were thought to be the work of sharks or boat propellers, but new research confirms a different cause.
teks_jawa: Anak anjing laut mati ing pulo Kanada wis ditemokake kanthi ciloko berbentuk spiral sing misterius nganti pirang-pirang taun. Tatu kasebut dianggep minangka karya hiu utawa baling-baling prau, nanging riset anyar negesake sabab sing beda.
teks_sunda: Pups anjing laut maot di hiji pulo Kanada geus kapanggih kalawan tatu spiral ngawangun misterius salila sababaraha taun. Tatu anu disangka karya hiu atawa baling-baling kapal, tapi panalungtikan anyar confirms sabab béda.
